game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Play Russian roulette with a 12-gauge shotgun. Four enter. One leaves. Roll the dice with your life. Good luck!

Shoot Your Friends

Take a seat at the new 4-way multiplayer table. Bargain. Beg. Betray. Become the ultimate victor. Walk away rich.

12-Gauge Action

Play Russian roulette with a 12-gauge. Cause shotguns just feel better.

Literally Mindblowing Gameplay

15 to 20-minute intense playtime. Enter the arena, go three rounds against The Dealer, and walk away with the prize. Or don't.

Immersive Atmosphere

Welcome to the underground nightclub, where metal railings pulse to the beats of forgotten drum machines.

Meet Your Match

Face off against The Dealer, playing the odds same as you. No tricks. Can you beat him at his own game?

Double or Nothing

Press your luck in the new Double or Nothing mode. How long can you last?

New Items

New items for the Steam release. Just cause we love you.

Seven tracks. No misses. Are you ready?

The Steam edition of Buckshot Roulette also includes the full soundtrack, created by Mike Klubnika.
game_info.description: Welcome to Shotgun Standoff - a deadly game of Russian Roulette in an underground arena. Face off against The Dealer in a high-stakes battle where both of you take turns with a loaded shotgun. The shotgun contains a mix of live rounds and blanks. Use items strategically to gain information and survive. Win two rounds to claim victory, but lose your health and it's game over. Only one walks away.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu options and select targets
Space: Confirm selection / Use selected item
Z: Quick shoot at self (when it's your turn)
Shift: Quick shoot at dealer (when it's your turn)
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic random gameplay test to ensure all game mechanics work correctly. Tests shooting, item usage, round transitions, and win/lose conditions through random valid actions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly choose between shooting self or dealer, and occasionally use items if available. Make decisions without strategic thinking to test the robustness of game mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should handle all random inputs gracefully without errors. Eventually reach a GAME_OVER state (win or lose) through natural gameplay. All mechanics should function correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Strategic win test that implements optimal decision-making. Uses items intelligently to gain information about shell types and maximize survival probability. Aims to defeat The Dealer.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use magnifying glass to check next shell when available. If next shell is blank, shoot self for extra turn. If live, shoot dealer. Use handsaw to double damage before shooting dealer with live rounds. Use cigarettes to heal when low on health.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat The Dealer by winning 2 rounds before losing all health. The test should demonstrate intelligent item usage and decision-making leading to a GAME_OVER_WIN state.
